top_signals.title: Russia Boosts Crude Oil Exports to Record While Prices Tumble
top_signals.summary: Despite surging shipments, Moscow's oil earnings have dropped to the lowest since March
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: JPM’s Michele Sees Fed ‘Maintenance Hikes’ Next Year
top_signals.summary: Bob Michele, global head of fixed income at JPMorgan Asset Management, explains the factors he sees leading the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates “once or twice” next year, but not engage in a “dramatic hiking cycle.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Struggles to Find Demand for Oil Driller’s 15% Loan - Bloomberg

top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Strategy's new plan divides industry observers even as MSTR, STRC climb
top_signals.summary: Strategy’s new Bitcoin capital framework draws Wall Street backing from Benchmark with a $570 per share target even as traders question long-term demand risk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ClassNK Introduces World's First Notation for Shipbuilding Carbon Footprints
top_signals.summary: Classification society ClassNK has introduced what it said is the world's first notation to indicate that greenhouse gas emissions generated during ship construction have been calculated and undergone third-party verification.The new notation…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
